text:
The Ten Dons (, Jūrōtō), also called the Ten Mafia Dons or simply Dons, were the ten leaders of the Mafia, each of whom controlled a territory in one of the six continents. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 74  It is unknown whether any Mafia members took their place after Illumi killed them all, but their influence has since waned. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 377 

Background

The Ten Dons would gather once a year at the start of September for the Underground Auction in Yorknew City. During that time, they would discuss their plans and issue orders, which their special bodyguards would then execute, the Shadow Beasts, each of whom was the most powerful Nen user in the service of one of the Dons. They were known to hold Neon Nostrade's fortunetelling abilities in high regard. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 96 It would also seem that they held an immense amount of combined wealth, which was enough to allow them to hire professional assassins. They also knew about the existence of Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 89 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Through Neon's predictions, the Dons begin to suspect that there might be problems with the Underground Auction, so they send Owl to relocate all the items. After a large number of Mafia members and auction clients are massacred by the Phantom Troupe, the Ten Dons send the Shadow Beasts to eliminate them. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 75 The Shadow Beasts are killed in the ensuing fight, prompting the Dons to put a bounty on the Spiders' heads Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 80 and hire professional assassins, including Kurapika, Silva and Zeno Zoldyck. Chrollo easily kills all except the latter three. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 97 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 98 Chrollo and the Zoldycks clash, but before they can finish him off, the Ten Dons are assassinated by Illumi who is accompanied by Kalluto and Maha, invalidating their contract with Silva and Zeno. Illumi then controls their corpses to start the Underground Auction Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 and cancel the bounty on the Phantom Troupe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 105 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

A source of inspiration for the Ten Dons may have been the Five Families of the New York Mafia.
